series_metadata.series_description: Cancelled Bids include any proposals received from a vendor responding to a Request for Proposal (RFP) or Invitation to Bid (ITB) where the RFP or ITB was canceled and not awarded. Any proposal documentation received from a prospective vendor as well as the bid folder documentation generated from a cancelled bid.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: When Bid is cancelled; 90 days, and ; Electronic: on Procurement I;/drive when bid is cancelled; 90 days, and
